chapters.title: Welcome to the Database 💾
chapters.description: Learn what databases are and write your very first SQL query.

chapters.title: Retrieving Data 🎣
chapters.description: Master the SELECT statement to fetch exactly what you need.

chapters.title: Filtering Results 🎯
chapters.description: Learn to use WHERE, AND, OR, and IN to narrow down your data.

chapters.title: Sorting and Limiting 📊
chapters.description: Organize your results with ORDER BY and LIMIT.

chapters.title: Aggregating Data 🧮
chapters.description: Summarize data using COUNT, SUM, AVG, and GROUP BY.

chapters.title: Joining Tables 🤝
chapters.description: Combine data from multiple tables using INNER and OUTER JOINs.

chapters.title: Modifying Data ✍️
chapters.description: Change the database with INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE.

chapters.title: Database Schema 🏗️
chapters.description: Create, alter, and drop tables. Understand data types.

chapters.title: Advanced Queries 🧠
chapters.description: Dive into Subqueries, CTEs, and Window Functions.

chapters.title: SQL Mastery 🏆
chapters.description: Learn about Indexes, Views, Transactions, and Performance.
